name: digital-ground-game-site
description: Odoo development environment with custom modules for digital ground game site

scripts.shell:db: docker-compose exec db psql -U odoo -d odoo
scripts.odoo:update: docker-compose exec odoo odoo-bin -d odoo -u all --dev=all
scripts.db:backup: docker-compose exec db pg_dump -U odoo -d odoo > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:restore: docker-compose exec -T db psql -U odoo -d odoo < backup.sql
scripts.help:
echo '
=== Odoo Development Commands ===
' && echo 'Start & Stop:' && echo '  pnpm run dev              - Start services in foreground' && echo '  pnpm run dev:detached     - Start services in background' && echo '  pnpm run stop             - Stop all services' && echo '  pnpm run stop:volumes     - Stop and remove volumes (WARNING: deletes data)' && echo '
Logs & Monitoring:' && echo '  pnpm run status           - Show service status' && echo '  pnpm run dev:logs         - Show all logs' && echo '  pnpm run dev:logs:odoo    - Show Odoo logs only' && echo '  pnpm run dev:logs:db      - Show database logs only' && echo '
Containers:' && echo '  pnpm run restart          - Restart all services' && echo '  pnpm run restart:odoo     - Restart Odoo only' && echo '  pnpm run restart:db       - Restart database only' && echo '  pnpm run shell            - Open bash in Odoo container' && echo '  pnpm run shell:db         - Open psql in database container' && echo '
Odoo Operations:' && echo '  pnpm run odoo:update      - Update all modules' && echo '  pnpm run odoo:scaffold    - Generate module scaffold' && echo '
Database:' && echo '  pnpm run db:backup        - Backup database to SQL file' && echo '  pnpm run db:restore       - Restore database from backup.sql' && echo '
Maintenance:' && echo '  pnpm run build            - Build/rebuild Docker images' && echo '  pnpm run clean            - Remove containers, volumes, and backups' && echo '
'
